flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 58% at The College of Saint Rose vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.2k vs 3.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The College of Saint Rose rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.7k → $23.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The College of Saint Rose rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.7k → $23.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at The College of Saint Rose rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.0k → $14.1k).
